PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT DOHERTY GEORGESON KERLEY LLP'S (SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO JUS VOX) MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. MATTER WAS ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. THE ACTS COMPLAINED OF ARE THE ISSUANCE OF A SUBPOENA IN AN ARBITRATION PROCEEDING AND ADVICE GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S WIFE BY HER LAWYER IN CONNECTION WITH THAT PROCEEDING, WHICH LED TO ARBITRATOR EXCLUDING PLAINTIFF FROM THAT PROCEEDING. THE GRAVAMEN OF THE CASE IS PROTECTED PETITIONING CONDUCT WITH CCP 425.16 AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE SHOWING A LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
